connection: Four are Philadelphia's 'Big Four' professional sports teams, competing in the NFL, MLB, NBA, and NHL. The Philadelphia Union plays in MLS — a league founded in 1993, not one of the four historic major North American pro sports leagues.
hints: The connection is about sports leagues, not the teams themselves.
Think about the four oldest, most established professional sports leagues in North America.
Four of these teams play at the Linc, Citizens Bank Park, the Wells Fargo Center, or the Spectrum. One plays at Subaru Park.
MLS was founded in 1993. The NFL, MLB, NBA, and NHL all predate 1950. The Philadelphia Union plays in MLS.
